version.name: 0.50-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.50-beta Changelog :
+ Play from Mouse: Fixed audio popping; added undo blocks for atomicity. + Mirror: Fixed bug where muting child tracks didn't trigger updates. + Advanced Rename: UI visual optimizations. + Simple Rename: UX improvements; double-click List/Number to switch modes. + Qi: Various minor improvements. + Fade: Fade-in and fade-out can now push against each other.
-- Mantrika Team -- 2026-04.09
